title: GPT-5.5 is a total freak
summary: AI Search reviews OpenAI's GPT-5.5 model, demonstrating capabilities across code generation, image analysis, cancer detection, 3D rendering, music composition, and video game creation. The review covers benchmarks, hallucination behavior, and practical use cases for the model.
